positive: A stylized and sophisticated forest creature—an elegant fox with iridescent fur, surrounded by bioluminescent floral elements and intricate vine work. The fox is depicted in a graceful, almost symmetrical pose, looking directly at the viewer. Use a deep, moody twilight color palette accented by vibrant emerald greens, sapphire blues, and glowing amber highlights. The style should be a detailed, engraved nature illustration mixed with modern mystical tattoo art. Composition must be highly detailed and centralized, forming a strong, striking silhouette against a dark background. High contrast, clean lines, excellent readability for apparel printing. --ar 1:1
